reason: Successfully verified that the SuperAgent can execute browser operations: open a browser, navigate to example.com, and retrieve the page title "Example Domain"
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing agents list
Step 2: Clicked on the "QA-20260603-200306-5gk8" agent in the sidebar — Agent opened successfully, displaying chat interface and configuration options
Step 3: Clicked message input textbox and typed "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was entered in the textbox and visible for sending
Step 4: Clicked Send button and waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent began working immediately, completed response in approximately 9 seconds
Step 5: Verified response and captured screenshot — Response successfully displayed "The page title is \"Example Domain\"." in the chat, along with:
